text:
BENE_ID 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 3 

BENE_ID 

LABEL: Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID 

DESCRIPTION: The unique CCW identifier for a beneficiary. The CCW assigns a unique beneficiary identification 
number to each individual who receives Medicare and/or Medicaid and uses that number to identify 
an individual’s records in all CCW data files (e.g., Medicare claims, MAX claims, MDS assessment data). 

This number does not
